---
title: Films du confinement
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557600/films_20210628_xmqjji.png
description: Films du confinement - A l'abordage, Fedora, le lac des oies sauvages, Aguirre
categories: [fanart]
date: 2021-12-11
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557600/films_20210628_xmqjji.png)
